name: Threat Hunting
description: Proactive investigation into attacker behavior across endpoints, identity, and cloud telemetry — hunting for what signature-based tools miss.

name: Detection Engineering
description: Turning one-off findings into durable, high-fidelity detections — KQL, Sigma, and YARA logic built to survive contact with production noise.

name: AI Security
description: How adversaries abuse AI systems and tooling, and how living-off-the-land thinking extends into AI-adjacent attack surfaces.

name: Cloud Security
description: Detection and defense across Azure and AWS — identity abuse, misconfiguration, and cloud-native attack paths.

name: Supply Chain Security
description: Tracing how trust in third-party software and update mechanisms becomes an attack vector, from compromise to detection.

name: Threat Intelligence
description: Structuring and operationalizing intelligence so it drives hunts and detections, not just reports.

name: MITRE ATT&CK Mapping
description: Mapping observed adversary behavior to ATT&CK to make research comparable, searchable, and actionable across teams.
